title.en: Senegal thrash 10-man Iraq to boost hopes of reaching last 32

summary.en: Iliman Ndiaye and Ismaila Sarr produce a goal and an assist each as Senegal dismantle 10-man Iraq 5-0 at Toronto Stadium, boosting hopes of a World Cup last-32 spot.
summary.zh-CN: 伊利曼·恩迪亚耶（ Iliman Ndiaye ）和伊斯梅拉·萨尔（ Ismaila Sarr ）在塞内加尔多伦多体育场（ Toronto Stadium ）以5比0击败10人伊拉克（ Iraq ）时各打出一个进球和一次助攻，这增加了世界杯最后

title.en: Arsenal poised to make Guimaraes offer after talks
title.zh-CN: 阿森纳准备在会谈后向吉马良斯出价

summary.en: Arsenal are poised to make an offer for Newcastle's Bruno Guimaraes after exploratory talks over potential moves for the Brazil midfielder and team-mate Sandro Tonali.

title.en: 17 passes, all 11 players - Dembele scores 'magic' goal for France

summary.en: Every member of France's starting XI gets involved as a 17-pass move is put away by Ousmane Dembele to seal his hat-trick in France's 4-1 win over Norway in their final FIFA World Cup Group I match...
summary.zh-CN: 法国首发阵容的每个成员都参与其中，奥斯曼·登贝莱（ Ousmane Dembele ）在最后一场国际足联世界杯I组比赛中以4比1击败挪威，将他的帽子戏法密封起来……
